Viduq2-pro only supports non-subject calls, so I need to use subject calls with viduq1 or viduq2 models instead for dialogue generation. Viduq2/viduq1/vidu2.0 support dialogue with subject calls, while viduq2-pro doesn't support dialogue. I'm clarifying which subjects qualify as '' in viduq2/viduq1 support dialogue. I clarified that subjects in viduq2/viduq1 can include non-character visual references like '' and '', not just characters. projectId,\\\\\\\\n        skipImages\\\\\\\\n      )\\\\\\\\n      set((s) =\u003e {\\\\\\\\n        // 再次拉取同一剧集时去掉旧项，否则列表里会出现两个相同 episodeId，\\\\\\\\n        // React key 重复会导致卡片/行渲染错乱（终端里 “duplicate \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"pending\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" // 刚拉取，未开始\\\\\\\\n  | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"endframe_generating\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" // 尾帧生成中\\\\\\\\n  | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"endframe_done\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" // 尾帧已生成\\\\\\\\n
